The '''SkyBlind''' was a reconnaissance [[Starship/Legends|starship]] designed by [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]] for [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] exploration. The main idea in mind for the design was to stay concealed while gathering information over a planet, to avoid hostile reactions from unknown lifeforms or primitive cultures. The SkyBlind used both [[Sensor jammer/Legends|sensor jammers]] and visually cloaking [[optical shield]]s to conceal itself. To a casual observer on the ground, a SkyBlind would appear as a discoloration in [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] that would be easily confused with natural phenomena.<ref name="GG8" />

The ship included a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] module for closer inspection and landing on small spots. This [[landing sphere]] could carry all the mission crew along with 5 metric tons of cargo, and like the main Skyblind body, it had cloaking capability. Not all SkyBlinds carried a landing sphere; if no landing sphere was docked aboard, the SkyBlind's cargo space doubled.<ref name="GG8" />
